channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: These are the best deals you can still get on MacBooks before Apple’s price hike kicks in
item.description: Apple just raised the prices on Macs and iPads in response to the rising costs of memory chips, right in the middle of Amazon Prime Day. That means existing discounts (even small ones) on Apple laptops like the MacBook Neo, MacBook Air, and MacBook Pro just became significantly better deals. As an example, the 13-inch […]

item.title: It's a dumb time to buy an Xbox, even with the coming price hike
item.description: This is a prime example of a bad deal.

item.title: Norton VPN adds split tunneling for Mac users in platform parity push
item.description: Norton has added split tunneling to its MacOS VPN app, allowing Mac users to choose which traffic they send through their VPN

item.title: The entire Google Pixel 10 line is on sale right now, but there's only one model I'd buy before Prime Day ends
item.description: Here's why the Google Pixel 10a is the only Google phone I'm recommending for Prime Day.

item.title: Streaming live World Cup soccer games on airplanes is becoming a reality
item.description: In-flight internet has long been notoriously terrible, but United Airlines and other carriers are hoping to change that with SpaceX’s Starlink. Soccer fans may soon be able to catch more than just flights while traveling this summer on one of America’s largest airlines.

item.title: AI doesn’t scale by removing people
item.description: It scales by moving them closer. AI was supposed to scale by removing humans. That was the promise. Build the product, automate the interaction, take the human out of the loop, and watch the margins compound. It was the SaaS playbook applied to intelligence.

item.title: Novak Djokovic has a new job — advisor to private equity firm General Atlantic
item.description: General Atlantic has tapped tennis legend Novak Djokovic to serve as a global strategic advisor.

item.title: Millions use Roundup. The Supreme Court just made a major decision about it
item.description: The high court ruled that federal labeling rules shield Roundup from many state-law failure-to-warn claims. Thousands of people who say Roundup caused their cancer were dealt a blow in court this week when the Supreme Court opted to protect the weedkiller’s parent company from a flood of lawsuits.

item.title: Notre Univers pourrait-il être né de l'effondrement d'une étoile en trou noir dans un univers parallèle ?
item.description: Et si les trous noirs n'existaient pas ? Et si les univers parallèles existaient ? Un lien entre ces deux hypothèses existe peut-être...

item.title: Lenovo declares a 'new normal' for higher memory pricing in the 2030s, while Microsoft forecasts prices to double again in a year
item.description: The RAM crisis could get a lot worse over the next few years if Lenovo and Microsoft are right — and I can easily believe they are.

item.title: 10 Best Prime Day Streaming Deals, Including Half Off Apple TV (2026)
item.description: Prime Day isn’t just about cheap TVs. It’s also about cheap stuff to watch on your cheap TV.

item.title: GTA 6 est 30 € moins cher : déjà des ruptures de stock, voici les meilleures offres de précommande pour le futur hit de Rockstar
item.description: Le compte à rebours est lancé pour GTA VI ! Rockstar Games a officiellement ouvert les précommandes du jeu le plus attendu de ces dix dernières années. Si les offres fleurissent déjà un peu partout sur le web, toutes ne se valent pas. Pour vous aider à vous y retrouver, découvrez notre sélection des meilleures offres pour vous offrir votre voyage à Vice City sans vous ruiner. ...

item.title: How to See the Giant Asteroid That Will Pass by Earth This Weekend
item.description: The asteroid will be visible for several nights from different parts of the world. We’ll tell you when and where to look, and what equipment you’ll need to spot it.

item.title: Our 36 favorite gaming deals on Prime Day for Switch, PS5, and Xbox
item.description: There are some some sizable discounts on new and recent hits from the last few years for the Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation 5, and the Xbox Series X / S for Prime Day. Most Amazon game deals are physical copies, but every so often there’s a better or equivalent price on digital versions, as well […]

item.title: Billionaire investor Leon Black defends $158 million paid to Epstein
item.description: Black is the co-founder and former chief executive of the private equity firm Apollo Global Management. Billionaire investor Leon Black said Friday that Jeffrey Epstein deceived him during a yearslong relationship in which he paid the disgraced financier $158 million, but insisted he committed no criminal wrongdoing as he appeared before the House Oversight Committee....

item.title: PSA: Samsung's latest 2026 TVs are on sale with up to $1,100 off — RH85H Micro RGB, S95H OLED, and QN80H Neo-QLED
item.description: We've just spotted some of the first major price cuts on these 2026 TVs thanks to Samsung's summer sale.

item.title: Prime Day is almost over — but I’ve found 12 board games under $20 to help you score a great last-minute deal
item.description: Want a last-minute Prime Day deal? Here are 12 fantastic games under $20 that you can still shop.

item.title: OpenAI limits GPT-5.6 rollout after government request, says restrictions shouldn’t be the norm
item.description: “We don’t believe this kind of government access process should become the long-term default,” says OpenAI. “It keeps the best tools from users, developers, enterprises, cyber defenders, and global partners who need them.”

item.title: Is your phone charger wasting electricity when it's not charging?
item.description: Homes with many phone chargers pay more even when they're not using them.

item.title: Venezuela earthquakes: Thousands injured, missing, without food or water. Here are 4 ways you can help right now
item.description: Two catastrophic earthquakes Wednesday, the most powerful to strike the nation in more than a century, have killed at least 589 people. Search efforts are underway in Venezuela after a pair of powerful earthquakes on Wednesday killed at least 589 people, leaving at least 3,000 people injured, thousands more unaccounted for, and countless others without food or water, according to the Associated Press. ...

item.title: Criterion 4K Blu-rays are 50% off again at Amazon and Barnes & Noble — don't miss your chance to grab beautiful collectors' edition movies for a great price
item.description: Everything Criterion has is half price, so get your favorite movies in beautiful collectors' editions.

item.title: On a roulé avec le nouveau vélo tout-chemin Amflow avec son moteur Avinox M2 de DJI : un VTTAE civilisé ?
item.description: Après les purs VTTAE, DJI vise des vélos électriques plus polyvalents avec l’Amflow TL Carbon, qui hérite du moteur Avinox M2 et de composants haut de gamme, le tout à prix très concurrentiel.

item.title: OpenAI poaches Uber India chief to lead its biggest market outside the US
item.description: The hire marks OpenAI's latest push into India, expanding offices, partnerships and hiring.

item.title: Accès limité | OpenAI lance son nouveau modèle GPT 5.6
item.description: OpenAI a commencé vendredi le déploiement de son nouveau modèle de pointe GPT 5.6 auprès d’un « groupe restreint de partenaires et d’organisations de confiance », pour l’heure uniquement basés aux États-Unis, a annoncé la start-up américaine d’intelligence artificielle.

item.title: I'm Adding These Bose Headphones to My Prime Day Cart (2026)
item.description: Bose headphones are already one of our favorites for comfort, sound, and noise canceling. Now they’re cheaper.

item.title: 15+ board game deals to grab before Prime Day ends tonight
item.description: The best board game deals for Prime Day include Twister, Azul, CATAN, Battleship, and more for up to 45% off.

item.title: What to expect at the next Samsung Galaxy Unpacked
item.description: Foldables, watches and glasses could be on the way from Samsung.

item.title: Prime Day is about to end, and I've decided to drop my mid-range Echo Pop for one of Amazon's best smart speakers — here's why
item.description: My Echo Pop has run its course, and now I've got my eye on the Echo Dot 5th Gen this Prime Day.

item.title: The Prime Day MacBook Deals I Recommend (2026)
item.description: Apple has warned about MacBook prices rising, making these Prime Day deals even more worthwhile to consider.

item.title: Get a break from RAMageddon with these last-chance Prime Day laptop deals: Save up to $850 on MacBooks
item.description: The best Prime Day laptop deals are going to the 15-inch Apple MacBook Air, a cheap Windows laptop, and lots of gaming laptops.

item.title: The beautiful shame
item.description: While European tourists marvel at ranch dressing, Buc-ee's, and other wonders of Middle America, would-be World Cup attendees from Africa, Asia, and the Middle East have experienced a different American pastime: exclusion. President Donald Trump's nakedly racist immigration policies have prevented scores of people from traveling to the United States for the event - even, […]...

item.title: NAIC confirms data breach with ShinyHunters claiming 3.1TB of data stolen in Oracle zero-day attack
item.description: Insurer regulatory filing documents, customer bulk orders, and more, stolen in a major zero-day supply chain attack

item.title: Apple just closed its first unionized store. What does that mean for its workers?
item.description: The union representing those workers framed the move as retaliation, while Apple cited business reasons. Either way, it could discourage other organizing efforts. In 2022, an Apple Store outside of Baltimore became the first in the U.S. to unionize, fueled by worker frustrations over how they were treated during the pandemic. Two years later, they won a contract that enshrined protections that seemed designed to enable other workers to follow in their footsteps. The contract secured a cap on the number of temporary workers Apple could hire and carved out a process by which the union could purs...

item.title: With these Prime Day deals, I can fill my kitchen with Le Creuset coffee cups without taking out a second mortgage
item.description: As much as I love Le Creuset stoneware, I can't usually afford it, so I'll be picking up some of these gorgeous cups while the deals last.

item.title: Prime Day ends soon! Dont miss these 175+ deals on Apple, Kindle, Lego, Ninja, and Sony products.
item.description: Amazon's summer sale is ending soon. Shop the best Prime Day deals on Sony headphones, OLED TVs, Sony headphones, and Apple Watches.

item.title: This video bird feeder is the surprise hit of Prime Day
item.description: I can understand why The Verge readers are flocking to the BirdBuddy deal we posted at the beginning of Prime Day. The BirdBuddy Pro with Solar Panels is a wholesome upgrade for your yard, but the full price of $299 is tough to stomach. After all, the BirdBuddy is essentially a video doorbell and solar […]

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 got another big price drop for Prime Day — at under $220, here's why you should get it instead of the Classic or the Ultra
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 is cheaper than it's ever been for Prime Day — and that includes earlier this week
